form.title: Submit a Ticket
form.subject: Subject
form.description_label_desc: Describe your issue, and our team will get in touch with you.
form.screenshot_help: Max size 5MB. Formats: PNG, JPG, WEBP.
form.success: Ticket submitted successfully! We will get back to you soon.
form.error: An error occurred while submitting the ticket. Please try again later.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.q1: How to set up API keys?
faq.a1: You can set up API keys in the "Settings" -> "Exchanges" section. We support Binance, Bybit, OKX, Bitget, Gate and BingX.
faq.a2: Yes, you can run any strategy in Paper Trading mode without risk of real funds.
faq.a3: Limits depend on your subscription plan. On the free plan, 10 backtests per day are available.

ai_helper.title: Need a quick answer?
